AUTH_REQUIRED.title: Sign in required
AUTH_REQUIRED.message: Your session has ended. Please sign in to continue.

AUTH_EXPIRED.title: Session expired
AUTH_EXPIRED.message: Your session has expired for security. Please sign in again.

AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED.title: Verification needed
AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED.message: Please complete multi-factor authentication to proceed.

AUTH_FORBIDDEN.title: Access denied
AUTH_FORBIDDEN.message: You do not have permission to perform this action.

ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.title: Account not found
ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.message: The account you are looking for could not be found.

ACCOUNT_FROZEN.title: Account frozen
ACCOUNT_FROZEN.message: This account has been frozen and cannot process transactions at this time.

ACCOUNT_CLOSED.title: Account closed
ACCOUNT_CLOSED.message: This account has been closed and is no longer active.

INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.title: Insufficient funds
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.message: There are not enough funds in this account to complete the transaction.

TRANSFER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.title: Transfer limit exceeded
TRANSFER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.message: This transfer exceeds your daily or per-transaction limit.

TRANSFER_INVALID_AMOUNT.title: Invalid amount
TRANSFER_INVALID_AMOUNT.message: Please enter a valid transfer amount greater than zero.

TRANSFER_SAME_ACCOUNT.title: Same account selected
TRANSFER_SAME_ACCOUNT.message: The source and destination accounts must be different.

TRANSFER_CUTOFF_PASSED.title: Cutoff time passed
TRANSFER_CUTOFF_PASSED.message: The daily processing cutoff has passed. Your transfer will be processed on the next business day.

TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND.title: Transfer not found
TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND.message: The transfer you are looking for could not be found.

BILL_NOT_FOUND.title: Bill not found
BILL_NOT_FOUND.message: The bill or payee you are looking for could not be found.

BILL_ALREADY_PAID.title: Already paid
BILL_ALREADY_PAID.message: This bill has already been paid.

BILL_PAST_DUE.title: Bill past due
BILL_PAST_DUE.message: This bill is past its due date. Late fees may apply.

CARD_NOT_FOUND.title: Card not found
CARD_NOT_FOUND.message: The card you are looking for could not be found.

CARD_LIMIT_INVALID.title: Invalid card limit
CARD_LIMIT_INVALID.message: The spending limit you entered is not valid. Please check the minimum and maximum allowed.

RDC_IMAGE_QUALITY.title: Image quality issue
RDC_IMAGE_QUALITY.message: The check image could not be read clearly. Please retake the photo in good lighting.

RDC_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED.title: Deposit limit exceeded
RDC_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED.message: This check exceeds your mobile deposit limit.

RDC_DUPLICATE_CHECK.title: Duplicate check detected
RDC_DUPLICATE_CHECK.message: This check appears to have already been deposited.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Validation error
VALIDATION_ERROR.message: Some fields contain invalid data. Please review and correct them.

INVALID_INPUT.title: Invalid input
INVALID_INPUT.message: Please check your input and try again.

RATE_LIMITED.title: Too many requests
RATE_LIMITED.message: You have made too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Something went wrong
INTERNAL_ERROR.message: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified.

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.title: Service unavailable
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.message: This service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.

GATEWAY_ERROR.title: Connection error
GATEWAY_ERROR.message: We could not connect to the banking service. Please check your connection and try again.

fallback.title: Something went wrong
fallback.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
